testcase.name: OverpassClient should successfully fetch a node
OverpassClient should handle API failure and retry
OverpassClient should fetch cafe amenities by bounding box
OverpassClient should fetch restaurant amenities by radius
OverpassClient should successfully fetch a way
OverpassClient should handle invalid query format (400)
OverpassClient should not retry on success
OverpassClient should retry on failure with exponential backoff
OverpassClient should return cached data for repeated requests
OverpassClient should clear cache
OverpassClient should return cached data for repeated bounding box requests
OverpassClient should return cached data for repeated radius requests
OverpassClient should handle 503 Service Unavailable errors with retry
OverpassClient should handle 504 Gateway Timeout errors with retry
OverpassClient should handle unknown HTTP status codes
OverpassClient should handle network errors without response
OverpassClient should handle 400 errors with detailed error parsing
OverpassClient should handle 429 Rate Limit with retry-after header
OverpassClient should handle relation element type
OverpassClient should handle multiple element types in bounding box query
OverpassClient should handle multiple element types in radius query
OverpassClient should handle custom output format
OverpassClient should handle bounding box query with custom output format
OverpassClient should handle radius query with custom output format
